name: still
description: Freeze animated GIFs, WebP, and APNG images to their first frame

scripts.convert:ios: xcrun safari-web-extension-converter web-extension/ --project-location Still/ --app-name Still --bundle-identifier com.jonbaker.still --ios-only --no-open
scripts.convert:macos: xcrun safari-web-extension-converter web-extension/ --project-location StillMac/ --app-name Still --bundle-identifier com.jonbaker.still --macos-only --no-open
scripts.convert:all: xcrun safari-web-extension-converter web-extension/ --project-location StillUniversal/ --app-name Still --bundle-identifier com.jonbaker.still --no-open

author: Jon Baker
